八年前遭遇灭门，十岁的陈天阳被武道至尊三圣女所救，如今学有所成，毅然下山复仇。
下山第一步，先斩意中人——退婚！
不料老丈人求婿若渴，誓要将他捧成天下第一婿……
老丈人：什么？你想退婚？门儿都没有！
陈天阳：叔叔，你们家是龙江首富，而我要啥没啥，我真的配不上你女儿。
老丈人：我说你配得上你就配得上！只要你肯娶我女儿，你要风我就给你风，要雨我就给你雨！以后谁敢再瞧不起你，老子就帮你弄死他！","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/c739a0e2d80e04779e658bdee87c0d0c","author":"一毛渡江","author_id":"","book_id":"7224777380131245071","book_name":"开局退婚，老丈人死活不同意","book_short_name":"","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#202838","creation_status":"0","genre":"0","genre_type":"0","read_count_text":"3万人在读","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"1","category_schema":"[{"category_id":27,"name":"战神赘婿","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=27&name=战神赘婿&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":1,"name":"都市","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=1&name=都市&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":25,"name":"赘婿","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=25&name=赘婿&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":26,"name":"神医","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=26&name=神医&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":124,"name":"都市修真","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=124&name=都市修真&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":389,"name":"单女主","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=389&name=单女主&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":834,"name":"1v1","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=834&name=1v1&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":838,"name":"无后宫","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=838&name=无后宫&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":845,"name":"高手下山","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=845&name=高手下山&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"}]","first_chapter_item_id":"7224777527238066746","read_count":"29651","title_page_tags":"","word_number":"3761266"},"relate_post_id":"","relate_post_schema":"","score":"8.8","serial_count":"1118","tags":"战神赘婿,都市,赘婿,神医,都市修真,单女主,1v1,无后宫,高手下山","thumb_url":"https://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/novel-pic/2c2294e0211782fa752ea8f656e69e74~tplv-noop.image?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1779164626&x-signature=WUOIgDITUXMSAy
